questionText: Break down, by fossil fuel expansion activity, your organization's CAPEX in the reporting year and CAPEX planned over the next 5 years.
questionKo: 구분, 화석 연료 확장 활동, 조직’s CAPEX 보고연도 CAPEX 계획된 5 연도.
simpleHelp: This question captures data on current and future CAPEX on exploration or new development activities for these fossil fuels. Data users wish to understand whether organizations are investing in the exploration/expansion of new fossil fuel resources. Under the IEA NZE scenario, the key policy assumptions state that no new oil and gas field exploration should occur after 2021 and no new coal mines or coal mine extensions should be approved for development after 2021.

rows.title: Exploration of new natural gas fields
Expansion of existing natural gas fields

columns.text: CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity (unit currency as selected in 1.2)
columns.textKo: CAPEX 보고연도 에 대한 이 활동 (단위 통화 선택됨 1.2)

columns.text: CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX in the reporting year
columns.textKo: CAPEX 보고연도 에 대한 이 활동 % 총 CAPEX 보고연도

columns.text: CAPEX planned over the next 5 years for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX planned over the next 5 years
columns.textKo: CAPEX 계획된 동안 향후 5 연도 에 대한 이 활동 % 총 CAPEX 계획된 동안 향후 5 연도

columns.text: Explain your CAPEX calculations, including any assumptions
columns.textKo: 설명 귀사의 CAPEX 산정s, 포함 모든

guidance.text:
General 
Complete all the cells within the table.
This question refers to any fossil fuel exploration, drilling, and front-end engineering, including any fossil fuel contractual agreements (i.e., engineering, procurement, construction, installation, and commissioning) awarded to projects where the final investment decision of the project occurred during or will occur after the reporting year.
Companies may exclude from their calculations CAPEX associated with contractual agreements made prior to the reporting year.
CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity (unit currency as selected in 1.2) (column 1) 
CAPEX figures should be in the currency you selected in 1.2.
If there was no CAPEX associated with an expansion activity in the reporting year, enter "0" for the corresponding row(s).
CAPEX figures should be based on your company-wide financial statement for the reporting year, consistent with your organizational boundary as disclosed in 1.5.
CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX in the reporting year (column 2) 
Enter your organization's CAPEX in the reporting year for the expansion activity (as reported in column 1) as a percentage of your organization's total CAPEX in the reporting year.
The sum of figures entered in this column for all rows should not exceed 100%.
If there was no CAPEX associated with an expansion activity in the reporting year, enter "0" for the corresponding row(s).
CAPEX planned over the next 5 years for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX planned over the next 5 years (column 3) 
Enter your organization's CAPEX planned for the expansion activity as a percentage of your organization's total CAPEX planned over the next 5 years.
The sum of figures entered in this column for all rows should not exceed 100%.
If you do not have any CAPEX planned for over the next 5 years for an expansion activity, enter "0" for the corresponding row(s).
It is acknowledged that the figure entered for this column will be estimates. You may, for example, estimate planned CAPEX for an expansion activity based on your organization's strategy, financial planning, and/or climate transition plan. Assumptions underlying these estimates should be disclosed in column 4.
Note that "the next 5 years" start from the end of the reporting year as reported in 1.4 e.g. if your reporting year in 1.4 is from 01/01/2022 to 31/12/2022, then the next 5 years will be from 01/01/2023 to 31/12/2027.
Explain your CAPEX calculations, including any assumptions (column 4) 
Explain how you calculated the figure reported in column 2 "CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX in the reporting year".
Explain how you estimated the figure reported in column 4 "CAPEX planned over the next 5 years for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX planned over the next 5 years". Briefly describe any assumptions on which your estimation is based.
Exploration of new oil field [OG only] (Row 1) 
Enter the CAPEX associated with the exploration and construction of new oil fields. This refers to any CAPEX associated with upstream activities (i.e., exploration and surveys, appraisals, field evaluations, infrastructure development, production) on greenfield sites. See Explanation of Terms for more information.
Exploration of new natural gas fields [OG only] (Row 2) 
Enter the CAPEX associated with the exploration and construction of new natural gas fields. This refers to any CAPEX associated with upstream activities (i.e., exploration and surveys, appraisals, field evaluations, infrastructure development, production) on greenfield sites. See Explanation of Terms for more information.
Expansion of existing oil fields [OG only] (Row 3) 
Enter the CAPEX associated with the expansion/extension of existing oil fields. This refers to any CAPEX associated with restoring or enhancing the operating capacity of a brownfield site for upstream activities, including project phases and expansions of existing fields/sites to increase gross total production beyond the current forecast or that facilitate enhanced recovery/production of existing assets (e.g., additional well tie-ins, injection enhanced recovery). This includes any Phase 2 developments for which there is CAPEX associated in the reporting year or planned for the next five years. See Explanation of Terms for more information.
Expansion of existing natural gas fields [OG only] (Row 4) 
Enter the CAPEX associated with the expansion/extension of existing natural gas fields. This refers to any CAPEX associated with restoring or enhancing the operating capacity of a brownfield site for upstream activities, including project phases and expansions of existing fields/sites to increase gross total production beyond the current forecast or that facilitate production of existing assets. This includes any Phase 2 developments for which there is CAPEX associated in the reporting year or planned for the next five years. See Explanation of Terms for more information.
Development of new coal mines [CO only] (Row 5) 
Enter the CAPEX associated with the development of new coal mines (both underground and surface mines) on greenfield sites. See Explanation of Terms for more information.
Expansion of existing coal mines [CO only] (Row 6) 
Enter the CAPEX associated with the expansion/extension of existing coal mines (both underground and surface mines). This refers to any CAPEX associated with restoring or enhancing the operating capacity of a brownfield site for coal mining activities, including project phases and expansions of existing mines to increase gross total production beyond the current forecast or that facilitate production of existing assets. This includes any Phase 2 developments for which there is CAPEX associated in the reporting year or planned for the next five years. See Explanation of Terms for more information.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: There is no exploration of new oil & gas fields and no new coal mines/extensions from 2021 onwards.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
Capital expenditure (CAPEX): a measure of the value of purchases of fixed assets such as property, buildings, an industrial plant, technology, or equipment. Put differently, CapEx is any type of expense that an organization capitalizes, or shows on its balance sheet as an investment, rather than on its income statement as an expenditure.
Greenfield site: A site which has not been developed and the infrastructure required for a project is not provided.
Brownfield site: A site where some work has been done. For example, the site has been partially developed with necessary infrastructure, has matured to a production site, or has progressed to a stage of declining production.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
All of the following met in both rows 'Development of new coal mines' AND 'Expansion of existing coal mines' - 2 points
Figure of 0 provided in column 'CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity (unit currency as selected in 1.2)' AND
Figure of 0 provided in column 'CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX in the reporting year' AND
Figure of 0 provided in column 'CAPEX planned over the next 5 years for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX planned over the next 5 years'.
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.

Figure of 0 provided in column 'CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity (unit currency as selected in 1.2)' AND
Figure of 0 provided in column 'CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX in the reporting year' AND

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
The following is met in both rows 'Expansion of existing oil fields' AND 'Expansion of existing natural gas fields' - 1 point
Figure provided in column 'CAPEX planned over the next 5 years...' is less than figure provided in column 'CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX in the reporting year'
OR
Figure of 0 provided in column 'CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity (unit currency as selected in 1.2)' AND
Figure of 0 provided in column 'CAPEX in the reporting year for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX in the reporting year' AND
Figure of 0 provided in column 'CAPEX planned over the next 5 years for this expansion activity as % of total CAPEX planned over the next 5 years'.
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '구분, 화석 연료 확장 활동, 조직’s CAPEX 보고연도 CAPEX 계획된 5 연도. 귀사의 보고 연도 CAPEX 와 향후 5 년간 계획된 CAPEX 를 화석 연료'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
